textPlain: My solar install is scheduled for December. Even if it ends up missing the cutoff for a tax break I still think it’s the right thing to do. The combination of investing in green energy and locking in my effective electric rate is the smart move right now.… and I heard on Friday that OpenAI is planning a data center 15 miles south of me. That can only make things worse.
hm, I think this contradicts the results from https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S104061902...
Whats the time to make your money back with and without the tax break?
